score.notes: Strong fit: Senior BI Analyst for a health-data org wanting governed self-serve BI on a modern stack — maps to self-serve-dashboards (semantic layer + Looker), reporting-turnaround (dbt + Power BI), data-quality-program (dbt tests + data dictionary), and churn-cohort-analysis (cohort/retention). comp 8: $118-135k well above the $78k target. visa 9: fully remote, open to global contractors via EOR per the posting — no sponsorship needed. remote 10: remote-first, async-friendly. growth 8: decision-support ownership at a growing health org. Weighted (0-100): 9*3+8*2+9*2+10*1.5+8*1.5 = 27+16+18+15+12 = 88 -> priority (>=80). NB: posting also wants healthcare/claims-data experience and analyst people-management the corpus lacks — see provenance GAP.

next_action.action: Human review of staged resume/cover, then /submit
